description: Error message from WLB application showing a failed edit operation to a markdown file due to text mismatch, requiring exact whitespace and newline matching.
Browser tab bar showing multiple open tabs including Weixin, Feishu, GitHub, Claude.ai, Slack, and others, with a Weixin URL in the address bar.
Slack conversation where MiaoDX asks GSD and WLB to test messaging with Claude, followed by both AI agents greeting Claude in the #copycat channel.
Slack message history showing GSD application sending periodic single-dot messages at regular intervals throughout a day, indicating heartbeat or status checks.
Discord mobile conversation with oc-demo-1-gsd bot showing bilingual status update about processing OpenClaw repository skills, listing 50+ directories and reading SKILL.md files.
Discord conversation where MiaoDX asks if bot is stuck, requests daily 10am scheduled task for system prompt summary; bot responds with delayed message acknowledgment.
Duplicate browser tab bar showing same tabs as image 3 with Weixin URL in address bar, blank page content.
Minimalist 404 error page with large black text, 'Page not found' subtitle, and 'Take me home' button on white background.
Discord conversation where MiaoDX instructs to save discussion to memory to prevent context loss, with bot acknowledgment via eyes and hourglass emoji reaction.
Chat messages showing bots GSD and WLB introducing themselves in a Chinese messaging app with timestamps at 11:23-11:24.
